description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style chaise with a high, tufted backrest and a wooden frame featuring intricate carved details and gold accents. The upholstery is a light, patterned fabric, complemented by a set of decorative cushions in various shapes and sizes, including a round pillow and several rectangular ones. The seat is wide and plush, designed for comfort, and the backrest is adorned with button tufting and a central carved crest. Both sides of the chaise have solid, upholstered armrests with matching carved wood panels and gold embellishments. The legs are elegantly curved, further enhancing the classical aesthetic. This piece exudes a sense of luxury and would be suitable for upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, boutique storefronts, or stylish public lounges.
description: A luxurious, vintage-style chaise with tufted upholstery, ornate wood carvings, and decorative cushions. The piece features a high backrest, curved legs, and gold-accented details.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the tall, upholstered backrest framed by carved wood, with the central crest and no visible cushions.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the arrangement of cushions, and the ornate wood panel with gold detailing on the armrest and leg.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full tufted backrest, all decorative cushions, and the symmetrical design of the seat and frame.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the cushions, the carved wood panel, and the curved leg.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high and gently curved, featuring deep button tufting and a central carved wood crest at the top. It is fully upholstered and bordered by a carved wooden frame with gold accents.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, upholstered and framed with carved wood panels featuring gold decorative elements.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, made of wood with a light finish and gold ornamental carvings, giving an elegant and classical appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a light-colored fabric with a subtle, repeating damask or floral pattern, and the backrest is tufted with buttons for added texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are five loose cushions: three rectangular, one square, and one round, arranged symmetrically along the seat and backrest, providing both comfort and decorative layering.
